title: Purdue Engineers selected for AI Fusion seed grants to help rapidly advance research
summary_en: Purdue Engineers are fostering interdisciplinary collaboration and innovation to advance AI applications through one-year seed grants.
title_cn: 普渡大学工程科研人员入选人工智能融合种子基金资助项目 助力快速推进研究工作

title: I became Purdue's storyteller: Thendral Kamal (AAE '26) goes from T2M rejection to moderating history
summary_en: AAE senior Thendral Kamal, who graduates in May, has become something of a spokesperson for Purdue University.
title_cn: 我成为普渡大学的讲述者：2026届航空航天学院学生森德拉尔·卡迈勒从T2M申请被拒到主持历史性活动

title: NASA associate administrator visits Purdue, tours Purdue Engineering research facilities
summary_en: NASA Associate Administrator Amit Kshatriya visited Purdue on Tuesday (April 21) to learn more about the university's state-of-the-art research facilities that support key NASA programs.
title_cn: 美国国家航空航天局副局长访问普渡大学并参观该校工程学研究设施
